text: Shen Ge

AI Engineer with 7+ years at PayPal building production ML and LLM systems for fraud, risk, and AML domains. Specializes in multi-agent LLM systems, RAG pipelines, graph neural networks, and end-to-end model deployment. Deep expertise in LangChain, LangGraph, and prompt optimization for enterprise-scale AI applications.
Technical Skills
LLM & Agents: LangChain, LangGraph, DSPy, Multi-Agent Systems, RAG, Graph-RAG, Prompt Engineering
ML & Deep Learning: PyTorch, GNN (GAT/GCN), AutoEncoder, DNN, Anomaly Detection, PU-Learning
Data & Infra: BigQuery, Spark, Neo4j, DGL, Gremlin, Model Serving | Languages: Python, SQL, Git
Work Experience
PayPal — AI Engineer  |  Feb 2019 – Present
AML Investigation Mate (Jan 2025 – Present)
Architected a LangChain deep-agent multi-agent system with specialized sub-agents for AML case retrieval, rule reasoning, evidence summarization, and SAR generation
Built a Graph-RAG knowledge layer encoding SOPs, regulations, and case history into a Neo4j knowledge graph for grounded agent reasoning
Achieved 80% decision accuracy (on par with senior investigators); reduced case review time from 3–4 hours to under 30 minutes (~85% reduction) via DSPy automatic prompt optimization
Text-to-SQL for Risk Investigation (Jan 2025 – Present)
Delivered 94% SQL correctness and 80% reduction in manual coding time via multi-step RAG + Chain-of-Thought prompting over BigQuery
Architected a stateful multi-agent workflow via LangGraph, integrating intent routing, data visualization, and feedback reuse into a human-in-the-loop platform
Proactive Fraud Detection with Graph ML (Jun 2023 – Dec 2024)
Built account clustering pipeline combining community detection and embedding similarity for early-stage fraud group detection
Trained AutoEncoder + edge-aware GAT over linking graphs for group-level and account-level risk scoring
Formulated resource allocation as Integer Linear Programming (ILP) to optimally assign investigator capacity
ML Model Development — Multiple Risk Domains (Feb 2019 – May 2023)
Owned end-to-end model lifecycle across consumer risk, merchant risk, and dispute automation, applying semi-supervised learning, anomaly detection, custom loss design, and explainable AI (SHAP)
Leadership: Mentored 2 junior data scientists; led PayPal’s Recommendation System Study Group (2024)
Education
Chinese University of Hong Kong — MSc in Business Analytics (2017–2018)
College of William and Mary — B.S. in Applied Mathematics, CS Minor (2013–2017) | GPA: 3.62/4.0 | 6× Dean’s List
